name: ChartMogul
description: ChartMogul — Subscription analytics platform calculating MRR, churn, LTV, and cohort metrics from Stripe, Braintree, and custom data.

seo.title: ChartMogul — Subscription Billing
seo.meta_description: ChartMogul: ChartMogul — Subscription analytics platform calculating MRR, churn, LTV, and cohort metrics from Stripe, Braintree, and custom data.

when_to_use: MRR, ARR, churn, and LTV analytics from Stripe or Braintree data
Cohort analysis to identify retention patterns in subscription SaaS
Revenue reporting for investor dashboards and board reports
Customer segmentation by plan, region, or acquisition channel for SaaS

pros: Accurate MRR, churn, and LTV straight from Stripe or Braintree
Strong cohort analysis and segmentation filters
CRM-style customer timeline with billing events
Flexible data import via CSV or API for custom stacks
cons: Pure analytics; does not handle billing or invoicing
Can get expensive at higher MRR tiers
Data reconciliation needed when rules change
Attribution of one-time revenue is sometimes awkward
review.verdict: Still the cleanest subscription analytics tool for Stripe-based SaaS; pricey but worth it once MRR is meaningful.
review.best_for: Stripe or Braintree SaaS wanting trustworthy MRR, churn, and cohort reports without building them.
review.not_for: Teams wanting billing in the same tool or very early startups with tight budgets.

lock_in.reason: Proprietary SaaS analytics with API export
